type=int,
    show_default=True,
    help="Database units per micron.",
)
@click.option(
    "--grid",
    default=None,
    type=float,
    help="Override placement grid size in microns (defaults to config/PDK).",
)
@click.option(
    "--ring-inset-um",
    default=275.0,
    type=float,
    show_default=True,
    help="Core inset from die edges in microns.",
)
@click.option(
    "--pad-spacing-um",
    default=0.0,
    type=float,
    show_default=True,
    help="Spacing between pads in microns.",
)
@click.option(
    "--mirror-inward/--no-mirror-inward",
    default=False,
    show_default=True,
    help="Mirror pad orientations to face pins toward core.",
)
@click.option(
    "--verilog-blackbox/--no-verilog-blackbox",
    default=True,
    show_default=True,
    help="Use blackbox Verilog with minimal pins.",
)
@click.option(
    "--capacity-margin-um",
    default=0.0,
    type=float,
    show_default=True,
    help="Extra slack per side for capacity calculations.",
)
@click.option(
    "--pdk-root",
    type=click.Path(path_type=Path),
    help="PDK root for locating IO GDS/LEF (defaults to $PDK_ROOT).",
)
@click.option(
    "--gds",
    "gds_refs",
    multiple=True,
    type=click.Path(path_type=Path),
    help="Explicit GDS reference files (can be repeated).",
)
@click.option(
    "--gds-dir",
    type=click.Path(path_type=Path),
    help="Directory containing Sky130 IO GDS libraries.",
)
@click.option(
    "--gds-out",
    type=click.Path(path_type=Path),
    help="Explicit output path for generated GDS (defaults to padframe DEF basename).",
)
@click.option(
    "--svg-out",
    type=click.Path(path_type=Path),
    help="Explicit output path for generated SVG (defaults to padframe DEF basename).",
)
@click.option(
    "--skip-gds",
    is_flag=True,
    help="Skip DEF → GDS conversion stage.",
)
@click.option(
    "--skip-svg",
    is_flag=True,
    help="Skip DEF → SVG rendering stage.",
)
@click.option(
    "--run-drc",
    is_flag=True,
    help="Run KLayout DRC on the generated chip GDS after build.",
)
@click.option(
    "--drc-deck",
    type=click.Path(exists=True, path_type=Path),
    default=None,
    help="Custom DRC rule deck (.drc). Defaults to bundled sky130A_mr.drc.",
)
def full_flow_command(
    config: Path,
    pdk: Path,
    lef_files: Sequence[Path],
    output_dir: Path,
    dbu_per_micron: int,
    grid: Optional[float],
    ring_inset_um: float,
    pad_spacing_um: float,
    mirror_inward: bool,
    verilog_blackbox: bool,
    capacity_margin_um: float,
    pdk_root: Optional[Path],
    gds_refs: Sequence[Path],
    gds_dir: Optional[Path],
    gds_out: Optional[Path],
    svg_out: Optional[Path],
    skip_gds: bool,
    skip_svg: bool,
    run_drc: bool,
    drc_deck: Optional[Path],
) -> None:
    """Run padframe generation and produce DEF/GDS/SVG/Verilog artifacts."""

    outputs = run_padframe_generation(
        config=config,
        pdk=pdk,
        lef_files=lef_files,
        output_dir=output_dir,
        dbu_per_micron=dbu_per_micron,
        grid=grid,
        ring_inset_um=ring_inset_um,
        pad_spacing_um=pad_spacing_um,
        mirror_inward=mirror_inward,
        verilog_blackbox=verilog_blackbox,
        capacity_margin_um=capacity_margin_um,
    )

    padframe_def = outputs["padframe_def"]
    core_def = outputs["core_def"]
